Fields.Name: Address
Fields.Description: Target/responding SimNet device instance or NMEA 2000 address

Fields.Name: Key Group
Fields.Description: First part of AC42 parameter lookup key

Fields.Name: Key
Fields.Description: Second part of AC42 parameter lookup key, little-endian

Fields.Name: Operation
Fields.Description: AC42 behavior: 0=query/read, 1=write with echo response, 2=response or write without echo

Fields.Name: Value
Fields.Description: Parameter value bytes. AC42 decodes this according to keyGroup/key.

PGNs.Description: Raymarine Pilot Configuration Response - Wind Type
Raymarine Pilot Configuration Response - Compass Linearisation Progress

Fields.Name: Proprietary Command
Fields.Description: Observed on-wire command word after manufacturer header. Captured value 0x0F6C; firmware uses internal command family constant 0x9F3BF006 before serializer repacking.

Fields.Name: Payload Word 1
Fields.Description: Observed little-endian 16-bit payload word. Sample value 0x0150.

Fields.Name: Payload Byte 1
Fields.Description: Observed byte following payloadWord1. Sample value 0x00.

Fields.Name: Payload Byte 2
Fields.Description: Observed byte following payloadByte1. Sample value 0x01.

Fields.Name: Manufacturer Code
Fields.Description: Parker Hannifin aka Village Marine Tech

Fields.Name: Manufacturer Code
Fields.Description: Parker Hannifin aka Village Marine Tech

PGNs.Description: Carling AC Input Line Voltages, ACGenII
Carling Board Temperatures and Voltage, ACGenII
Carling Serial Number / Device Instance / System Instance Change Response
Carling: Keypad Function LED Configuration Response
AIS Class B "CS" Static Data Report, Part B

Fields.Name: Number of bits in Binary Data Field

PGNs.Description: Carling: Breaker Status and Electrical Values

Fields.Name: Schedule A Load Shed Priority (High Nibble)
Schedule B Load Shed Priority (Low Nibble)

PGNs.Description: CZone: Circuit State Bitmap Group B

Fields.Name: Configuration Block Index
Fields.Description: Sequential transfer block number. The corresponding ZCF file offset is usually blockIndex * 200.

Fields.Name: Flags
Fields.Description: Observed value 1 during ZCF configuration upload.

Fields.Name: Transfer Prefix
Fields.Description: Variable-length prefix before the actual ZCF file bytes. Commonly 18 bytes of 0xFF, but some blocks may use a different control prefix.

Fields.Name: ZCF File Data
Fields.Description: Variable-length ZCF file fragment after removing the transfer prefix. Usually up to 200 bytes. Place at file offset blockIndex * 200.

PGNs.Explanation: Proprietary CZone extended status message. The payload contains a 4-byte header followed by a variable number of 3-byte status records.

Fields.Name: Text
Fields.Description: Null-terminated alarm text, up to 214 bytes

EnumValues.Name: Serial Number / Device Instance / System Instance Change Response
Breaker Status and Electrical Values / Solenoid Drive Sequence, ACGenII
